characters.name: Aaron Baker
characters.description: Aaron BakerGeneral InformationGender:MaleAge:22Birthday:December 7thOccupation:AttorneyVolunteer(Formerly)Status:AlivePersonal InformationFamily:Jim Baker(father)Deb Baker(mother)Evan Baker(brother)Employer:Junior Justice CenterEducation:High school graduateProduction InformationFirst appearance:TrustLast appearance:Meet the FostersPortrayer:Elliot Fletcher Aaron Bakeris a recurring character onThe Fosters. He is close friends withCallieand worked with her in solving the murder case of Mrs. Johnson. Their goal was to prove that the prosecuted suspect,Kyle Snow, was innocent of the crime. Aaron dated Callie before they broke up, but have remained very close friends ever since. Aaronis portrayed byElliot Fletcher. Aaron is always willing to help out someone in need, such as helping Callie to prove someone's innocence. He is very kind, he always cheers people up in times of need.

characters.name: Adriana Martinez
characters.description: Adriana MartinezGeneral InformationGender:FemaleAge:50sStatus:AlivePersonal InformationFamily:Rafael Martinez(Father-in-Law)Jazmin Martinez(Daughter)Gael Martinez(Son)Lyric Martinez(Granddaughter)Marital:Married toHugo MartinezProduction InformationFirst appearance:"Doble Quince"Latest appearance:"Closing Arguments"Portrayer:Ruth ZalduondoAdriana Martinezis a minor recurring character in theFreeformseries,Good Trouble. Adriana is the old-fashioned first generation Mexican-American mother ofGaelandJazmine. She has very specific views on the world, views that begin to shift as she learns to accept her children for who they are. Adriana is a middle-aged woman in her fifties or early sixties, with honey brown hair that she often styles in a bun, almond-shaped brown eyes, and a thin frame. She wears modest yet classy clothing and enjoys accessorizing. She almost always has a cross necklace around her neck.

characters.name: Aiden
characters.description: AidenGeneral InformationGender:MaleOccupation:StudentStatus:AlivePersonal InformationEducation:Anchor Beach Community Charter SchoolProduction InformationFirst appearance:PilotLast appearance:InvisiblePortrayer:Adam Kang Aidenis a recurring character on the Freeform series,The Fosters. Starting in season 3, he andMariana Adams Fosterstart a rivalry due to their disagreements in the robotics competition. Even after the competition, they don't see eye to eye with each other.  He made his first appearance inPilot. Aidenis portrayed by Adam Kang.

characters.name: AJ Hensdale
characters.description:
AJ HensdaleGeneral InformationGender:MaleAge:22Occupation:StudentStatus:AlivePersonal InformationFamily:Unnamed MotherUnnamed Father (deceased)Iris Hensdale(grandmother; deceased)Mike Foster(foster father)Brandon Foster(foster brother)Ty Hensdale(older brother)Education:Anchor Beach Community Charter SchoolProduction InformationFirst appearance:WreckageLatest appearance:SanctuaryPortrayer:Tom Williamson Iris Hensdale(grandmother; deceased)Mike Foster(foster father)Brandon Foster(foster brother)Ty Hensdale(older brother) Anthony Joseph "AJ" Hensdaleis a recurring character inThe Fosters.
AJ is a runaway foster teen with a complicated past. He is searching for his older brother,Ty Hensdale. He temporarily moved in with the Fosters when Mike began the process for an official license to foster children in order to legally take him in. In the episode, "Idyllwild", AJ officially became Mike's foster son and moved into Mike's apartment. AJ has shown to have something of a hard exterior initially, due to his mistreatment in the foster system as well as being racially profiled quite often for being African American. He also has displayed, like Callie at the beginning of the series, a hesitation to trust others. Despite this, once his guard is let down, AJ is shown to be a carefree and friendly guy, even easily accepting of the LGBT community. This is displayed when his reaction to learning about Stef and Lena is a simple "cool" response, and saying how cool it'd be to have two mothers. He also held an automatic acceptance of Cole when learning of his transgender status, even though he was surprised initially.

characters.name: Alan Kwan
characters.description: Alan KwanGeneral InformationGender:MaleAge:60sStatus:AlivePersonal InformationFamily:Alice Kwan(Daughter)David Kwan(Son)Marital:Trea Kwan(Wife)Production InformationFirst appearance:Willful BlindnessLatest appearance:Closing ArgumentsPortrayer:Robert Michael LeeAlan Kwanis the husband ofTrea Kwan, and the  father ofAliceand David.

characters.name: Alex Wood
characters.description: Alex WoodGeneral InformationGender:MaleAge:25Occupation:Software EngineerStatus:AlivePersonal InformationMarital:SingleEmployer:Speckulate(Formerly)Education:MITProduction InformationFirst appearance:DTLALatest appearance:Trap HealsLast appearance:Trap HealsPortrayer:Dustin Ingram Alex Woodis a software engineer and coder who worked forSpeckulateuntil his misogyny resulted in his firing. He was the leader of Team Blue for the company. Alex is a pompous and sexist man in his early twenties, who has an edge to him about working withMariana. Alex has a brilliant mind that can write complex code, though also maintains an invincibility complex. He always thinks his work is perfect and gets easily offended when people question him or his efforts. Alex is not above degrading colleagues whom he feels are beneath him, even going as far as to try and take credit for Mariana's ideas. Alex is a pompous and sexist man in his early twenties, who has an edge to him about working withMariana. characters.name: Alice Kwan
characters.description: Alice KwanGeneral InformationGender:FemaleAge:20sAddress:The CoterieOccupation:Manager ofThe CoterieStand-up comedianCBTV Contestant(former)Status:AlivePersonal InformationFamily:Trea Kwan(mother)Alan Kwan(father)Marital:datingSumi LiuEmployer:Self-employedMargaret Cho(one tour)Production InformationFirst appearance:"DTLA"Portrayer:Sherry Cola Alice Kwanis a major character in theFreeformseries,Good Trouble. She is portrayed bySherry Cola. Alice is the manager ofThe Coterieapartment complex. She is a lesbian first-generation Asian-American woman who is trying to find her voice comedically and personally. Alice is humble, down-to-earth, and extremely selfless. She puts everyone else's needs above her own and trusts people too much. She doesn't handle confrontation well, and instead, brushes off instances where she should stand up for herself. Alice views herself in a negative light and thinks she is a disappointment to her parents, which was why she refused to come out as a lesbian to her family. It wasn't untilJoeypointed it out that Alice realized the reason she refused to come out and her peculiar behavior was because she couldn't fully accept herself. After coming out to her parents, Alice realized they already knew and are fully supportive. This gives her the confidence to move on from her ex-girlfriend,Sumi. Despite her positive qualities and self-proclaimed feminist attitude, Alice has no qualms putting down other women or mocking them behind their backs. This is evident in the way she treatsCalliein a group chat with her friends ofThe Coterie; mocking and making fun of Callie while being pleasant to her face.

characters.name: Allison Wilson
characters.description: Allison WilsonGeneral InformationGender:FemaleAge:20sOccupation:StudentStatus:AlivePersonal InformationFamily:Curtis Wilson(father)Libby Wilson(mother)Tate Wilson(brother; deceased)Education:Smith CollegeProduction InformationFirst appearance:"Playing the Game"(mentioned)Portrayer:Tara ShayneAllison Wilsonis a character in theFreeFormseries,Good Trouble. Allison is the oldest child ofLibbyand JudgeCurtis Wilson. She is also the older sister ofTate Wilson. Allison is the oldest child ofCurtisandLibby Wilson. She grew up privileged in a wealthy, conservative family. It is implied that similar to her younger brother,Tate Wilson, Allison had a distant relationship with her father due to Curtis' heavy focus on his career. Alison is a student at Smith College and is currently studying abroad in France for a year.

characters.name: Ana Gutierrez Foster
characters.description: Ana Gutierrez-FosterGeneral InformationGender:FemaleAge:42Birthday:May 10, 1983Status:AlivePersonal InformationFamily:Victor Gutierrez(Father)Elena Gutierrez(Mother)Three brothersJesus Adams Foster(Biological Son)Mariana Adams Foster(Biological Daughter)Isabella Gutierrez(Daughter)Unborn ChildBrandon Foster(Step-Son)Eliza Foster(Step Daughter-in-Law)Adriana Gutierrez(Niece)Marital:Married toMike FosterProduction InformationFirst appearance:PilotLast appearance:Many RoadsPortrayer:Alexandra Barreto Ana Gutierrez-Fosteris the biological mother ofJesusandMariana Adams Fosterbut abandoned them when they were young for another man and drugs, and the twins were placed into the foster care system. Almost a decade later, Ana contacted Mariana, searching for money for drugs, manipulating and blackmailing the whole family. She was presumed to be deceased, but she was later revealed to be alive and recovering from her addictions with the help ofMike Foster. She became clean and made her amends with Jesus and Mariana for all the mistakes she made.

characters.name: Andre Johnson
characters.description: Andre JohnsonGeneral InformationGender:MaleAge:15-17Occupation:StudentStatus:AlivePersonal InformationFamily:Unnamed MotherMarital:SingleEducation:Diane Hash ElementaryProduction InformationFirst appearance:Gumboot BeckyPortrayer:Terrell Ransom Jr. Andre Johnsonis a minor guest character in theFreeformseries,Good Trouble. Andre is a student at Diane Hash Elementary who is part of their diversity program. He is the student ofDavia Mossand his difficult school life opens her eyes to the injustices in the school system. Andre is a smart young teenager who is witty, out-spoken, and seems to find himself in trouble often. He is defensive due to constantly being profiled at school, but learns to open up to Davia, even remarking that she is his favorite teacher.
characters.personality_section: Andre is a smart young teenager who is witty, out-spoken, and seems to find himself in trouble often. He is defensive due to constantly being profiled at school, but learns to open up to Davia, even remarking that she is his favorite teacher.

characters.name: Angela Miller
characters.description: Angela MillerGeneral InformationGender:FemaleAge:40sOccupation:Head of human resources(Formerly)Status:AlivePersonal InformationEmployer:Speckulate(Fired)Production InformationFirst appearance:DTLALast appearance:DisruptionsPortrayer:Heather MazurAngela Milleris a recurring character in theFreeFormseries,Good Trouble. She is portrayed by Heather Mazur. the head of human resouraces atSpeckulate. Angela was the incredibly loyal head of HR atSpeckulate, willing to do whatever it takes to protectEvan Speckand the employees. She is later fired afterKendra Zahirdiscovers that Angela buried sexual harassment claims againstJosh Mandela.

characters.name: Angelica Sofer
characters.description: Angelica SoferGeneral InformationGender:FemaleAge:25-28Occupation:WaitressBartenderStatus:AlivePersonal InformationMarital:SingleEmployer:DouroProduction InformationFirst appearance:Opening StatementsLatest appearance:That's Me in the SpotlightPortrayer:Odelya Halevi(Season 3)Yasmine Aker(Season 4)Anglica Soferis a minor recurring character in theFreeformseries,Good Trouble. Angelica is a queer waitress atDouro, who navigates her way through a complicated new relationship with Malika, while dealing with the fallout of her last relationship. Her new relationship with Malika opens up a whole new world for Malika. Angelica is a pretty woman in her mid-to-late twenties with high cheekbones, an oblong face, and big brown eyes. She has dark brown hair that reaches her shoulders.

characters.name: Becka
characters.description: BeckaGeneral InformationGender:FemaleAge:16Personal InformationFamily:Belinda(mother)Unnamed(grandmother)Production InformationFirst appearance:House and HomeLast appearance:It's My PartyPortrayer:Annamarie Kenoyer Beckais a recurring character onThe Fostersand a main character on the web series spinoff,Girls United. She was first introduced inHouse and Homeas one of the girls inGirls United. As a young girl, Becka would be sexually abused by her mother's boyfriend while her mom was off getting high. She started doing drugs with her grandmother when she was 11. Becka had a best friend whom she was very close to and claimed was the only person who actually cared about her. However, the girl later died from a drug overdose, much to her devastation.

characters.name: Benjamin
characters.description: BenjaminGeneral InformationGender:MaleAge:24Occupation:Judicial ClerkStatus:AlivePersonal InformationEmployer:JudgeCurtis WilsonEducation:Harvard school of lawProduction InformationFirst appearance:DTLALast appearance:TrustPortrayer:Ken KirbyBenjaminis a former recurring and guest character in theFreeformseries,Good Trouble. He is portrayed byKen Kirby. Benjamin is a conservative clerk who clerks for JudgeCurtis Wilsonat his court of law, previously alongsideCallie Adams FosterandRebecca. Benjamin was born and raised in Denver. He attended Harvard school of law for college and graduated with honors. However, he paid for the schooling on his own which resulted in a lot of debt. He eventually earned a job clerking for the Federal JudgeCurtis Wilson. He worked withRebeccabefore Callie's arrival at the clerk's office, suggesting that he is older than both Rebecca and Callie. Rigid and business-oriented, Ben strives for perfection. He is intelligent, whip-smart, and sarcastic nearly to a fault. He has an innate desire to impress Judge Wilson, even if it means pitting Rebecca and Callie against each other. When not competing with them, he showed to have a caring side and he is open to giving Callie advice despite their rocky pasts.

When not competing with them, he showed to have a caring side and he is open to giving Callie advice despite their rocky pasts.

characters.name: Bonnie Moss
characters.description: Bonnie MossGeneral InformationGender:FemaleAge:50s-60sAliases:Veglover(Insta handle)Status:AlivePersonal InformationFamily:Davia Moss(daughter)Production InformationFirst appearance:UnfilteredLast appearance:UnfilteredPortrayer:Reagan PasternakBonnie Mossis the mother ofDavia Moss. She is portrayed by Reagan Pasternak. The Coterie Bonnie trolls Davia on Instagram by telling her to eat more vegetables. Davia lashes out over her remark and later tells Mariana that "veglover" is her mother. She explains that even as a child, Bonnie thought Davia was to blame for the bullying and harshness she received for being overweight.

Brandon is a sensitive, brooding type of person who is known for his musical talent. He is also very selfless and would do about anything for the people that he loves, as shown variously throughout the series, often putting others ahead of himself. Brandon is not a geek nor a popular kid. He is somewhere in between.

characters.name: Bryan
characters.description: BryanGeneral InformationGender:MaleAge:20sOccupation:Event plannerStatus:AlivePersonal InformationEmployer:The Standard HotelProduction InformationFirst appearance:DTLALast appearance:Broken ArtedPortrayer:Michael GalanteBryanis an openly gay man who lives in downtown LA and works as an event planner at the Standard Hotel.[1] Bryan is portrayed byMichael Galante. He is a calm and collected man, who is highly competitive and coy. He gets close to Mariana in order to ask her questions about Callie and Gael's relationship. He enjoys PDA and could be considering possessive and the jealous type. He is a calm and collected man, who is highly competitive and coy. characters.name: Callie Adams Foster
characters.description: Callie Adams FosterGeneral InformationGender:FemaleAge:28Birthday:July 11th, 1997[1]Address:Washington D.COccupation:Lawyer(currently)Research Assistant(formerly)Status:AlivePersonal InformationFamily:Colleen Jacob(biological mother; deceased)Stef Adams Foster(adoptive mother)Lena Adams Foster(adoptive mother)Jude Adams Foster(maternal half-brother)Brandon Foster(adoptive brother)Jesus Adams Foster(adoptive brother)Mariana Adams Foster(adoptive sister)Francesca Adams Foster(adoptive sister: deceased)Ka'maya(foster sister)Dana Adams(adoptive grandmother)Stewart Adams(adoptive grandfather)Sharon Elkin(adoptive grandmother)Frank Cooper(adoptive grandfather: deceased)Sophia Quinn(biological paternal half-sister)Robert Quinn(biological father)Nathan Adams(adoptive uncle)Robert Quinn, Sr.(paternal grandfather)Marital:Engaged toJamie HunterEmployer:ACLUKathleen Gale(formerly)Legal Aid(formerly)Curtis Wilson(formerly)Education:ABCC(graduated)UCSD(graduated)Production InformationFirst appearance:Pilot(The Fosters)DTLA(Good Trouble)Last appearance:Where the Heart Is(The Fosters)What Now?(Good Trouble)Portrayer:Maia MitchellNikki Han(Age 10) Callie Quinn Adams Foster(bornCallie Jacobs) is a major character in theFreeformseriesThe Fosters, a recurring character inGirls United, and a former main character in,Good Trouble. She is portrayed byMaia Mitchell. Callie is the adoptive daughter ofStefandLena Adams Foster, the oldest biological daughter ofColleen Jacob, who passed away, and the oldest biological daughter ofRobert Quinn. She is also the oldest step-daughter ofDonald Jacob. She isJude's maternal half-sister, andSophia Quinn's paternal half-sister. She's also the adoptive sister ofBrandon,Mariana, andJesus. Callie is independent, intelligent, artsy and very loyal as well as protective over her loved ones. Throughout her youth, she is shown to always put the needs of others ahead of herself, even if it costs her trouble. As a result of living and growing up in the foster system for the majority of her life, Callie is tough and has built up walls to protect herself from pain - both physically and emotionally. However, she is also compassionate and kind. She loves her younger brother Jude very much, always putting him ahead of herself and has even risked her life for him. It is also shown that she doesn't care what happens to her, as long as she knows that he is safe. As a result of taking care of Jude for most of her life, she has a strong tendency to sometimes act like his mother instead of his sister, much to Jude's frustration. Despite her maternal instincts, Callie has a tendency to get herself into dangerous situations by choosing not to trust the adult figures in her life. She often felt as though by confiding in her moms, they would want to get rid of her - believing herself to be disposable. It took Callie many years to trust that her home with Adams Fosters was permanent, and that despite her mounting mistakes, they would always love her as their

Despite her maternal instincts, Callie has a tendency to get herself into dangerous situations by choosing not to trust the adult figures in her life. She often felt as though by confiding in her moms, they would want to get rid of her - believing herself to be disposable. It took Callie many years to trust that her home with Adams Fosters was permanent, and that despite her mounting mistakes, they would always love her as their own. As a young adult, Callie is remarkably intelligent and free-thinking, fighting for equality and a better world through politics. She is brave, fearless, wildly independent, and stubborn. characters.name: Carmen Cruz
characters.description: Carmen CruzGeneral InformationAge:17Production InformationFirst appearance:House and HomeLast appearance:IdyllwildPortrayer:Alicia SixtosCarmenis a recurring character onThe Fostersand a main character in the web series spinoff,Girls United. She was first introduced inHouse and Homeas one of the girls inGirls United. She is portrayed byAlicia Sixtos. Carmen was sent to juvie three times for being involved with gangs, drugs, and kidnapping. She was placed in Girls United six months prior toHouse and Home.

characters.name: Carter Hunter
characters.description: Carter HunterGeneral InformationGender:MaleAge:19-21Status:AlivePersonal InformationFamily:Jim Hunter(father)Diane Hunter(mother)Jamie Hunter(older brother)Eliza Foster(older sister)Brandon Foster(brother in-law)Education:Princeton UniversityProduction InformationFirst appearance:Meet the FostersNochebuenaLast appearance:Where the Heart IsKlompendansenPortrayer:Spencer ListCarter Hunteris the younger brother ofElizaandJamieand the youngest son ofJimandDiane Hunter. He is portrayed by Spencer List. Carter is the youngest child ofJimandDiane Hunter, and the youngest brother of bothElizaandJamie. He grew up in a very strict and conservative household, as his parents held traditional values and ideas about the world. Because of this, Carter never felt safe coming out as gay or bisexual. Instead, he repressed his feelings and dated girls, even though he may not have been physically attracted to them. Carter is a young adult with short, wavy, dark brown hair and brown eyes. He once had an asymmetrical haircut with one side buzzed and the other reaching to his jawline. He wore his hair shaggy over his eyes and casual clothing, though his upper-class status allows him to wear expensive clothing even if it appears relaxed.
